"[3] The user's device battery state is 31-60%. Their verified phone number is +19094181629. The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency. This request is for MULTIPLE PEOPLE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH. NO ONE is trapped. The person in need IS injured. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH."
"[12] [Appended, 18:35:05] [2] TIS IS THE CHP WHAT IS A DESCRIPTION OF YOUR VEH AND ARE YOU INJURED"

"[11] [Appended, 18:35:05] [1] A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. At 01:22AM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.2324 (N), Longitude -117.8464 (W).NowResponders may need to search an area extending at least 40 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 432 meters. Responders may need to search 30 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The user's device battery state is 31-60%. Their verified phone number is +15626173336.NowThe user's iPhone detected a VEHICLE CRASH that is LIKELY TO HAVE RESULTED IN INJURY. It is UNKNOWN how many OCCUPANTS may have been in the vehicle. This concludes the automatically-assembled data. You may now attempt to contact the user. However, messages may be delayed, and the user may not be able to respond.Now(562) 617-3336Send message inEnglish"
